name: Bone Scan
description: Technetium-99m bone scintigraphy for bone metastasis evaluation

findings.technique: Whole-body bone scintigraphy was performed with Tc-99m MDP.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Axial Skeleton
sections.content: Spine and ribs [no abnormal uptake / no hot spots]. Normal physiologic uptake.

sections.name: Appendicular Skeleton
sections.content: Long bones [no focal abnormal uptake]. Joints [normal physiologic uptake].

impression:
1. No focal bone lesions identified.
2. Normal bone scan.
author: RadReport Templates
